channel.title: Secomea A/S — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Secomea A/S (secomea).

item.title: CVE-2025-14716 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Unauthorized access to information
item.description: Improper Authentication vulnerability in Secomea GateManager (webserver modules) allows Authentication Bypass.This issue affects GateManager: 11.4;0.

item.title: CVE-2021-32007 · 3.5 LOW — Missing security header: Referrer-Policy URL
item.description: This issue affects: Secomea GateManager Version 9.5 and all prior versions. Protection Mechanism Failure vulnerability in web server of Secomea GateManager to potentially leak information to remote servers.

item.title: CVE-2024-1969 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Heap buffer overflow
item.description: Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input ('Classic Buffer Overflow') vulnerability in Secomea GateManager (webserver modules) allows crash of GateManager.This issue affects GateManager: from 9.7 before 11.2.624095033.

item.title: CVE-2024-1579 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Insufficient seeding of random number generator
item.description: Incorrect Usage of Seeds in Pseudo-Random Number Generator (PRNG) vulnerability in Secomea GateManager (Webserver modules) allows Session Hijacking.This issue affects GateManager: before 11.2.624071020.

item.title: CVE-2023-3675 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Insufficient input validation when downloading certain file types.
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in Secomea GateManager (Web GUI) allows Reading Data from System Resources.This issue affects GateManager: from 11.0.623074018 before 11.0.623373051.

item.title: CVE-2023-2912 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — SiteManager Embedded service disruption
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Secomea SiteManager Embedded allows Obstruction.

item.title: CVE-2022-38125 · 5.5 MEDIUM — FTP Agent forwards traffic on inactive ports to LinkManager
item.description: Improper Restriction of Communication Channel to Intended Endpoints vulnerability in Secomea SiteManager (FTP Agent modules) allows Exploiting Trust in Client.

item.title: CVE-2023-0317 · 4.9 MEDIUM — GateManager debug interface is included in non-debug builds
item.description: Unprotected Alternate Channel vulnerability in debug console of GateManager allows system administrator to obtain sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2022-4308 · 8.8 HIGH — Clear-text passwords in configuration files
item.description: Plaintext Storage of a Password vulnerability in Secomea GateManager (USB wizard) allows Authentication abuse on SiteManager, if the generated file is leaked.

item.title: CVE-2022-38124 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Unwanted debug tool
item.description: Debug tool in Secomea SiteManager allows logged-in administrator to modify system state in an unintended manner.

item.title: CVE-2022-2752 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Potential vulnerabilities in GM login process
item.description: A vulnerability in the web server of Secomea GateManager allows a local user to impersonate as the previous user under some failed login conditions. This issue affects: Secomea GateManager versions from 9.4 through 9.7.

item.title: CVE-2022-38123 · 8.7 HIGH — Insufficient validation of plugin files
item.description: Improper Input Validation of plugin files in Administrator Interface of Secomea GateManager allows a server administrator to inject code into the GateManager interface. This issue affects: Secomea GateManager versions prior to 10.0.

item.title: CVE-2022-25786 · 4.9 MEDIUM — GateManager debug interface is included in production builds
item.description: Unprotected Alternate Channel vulnerability in debug console of GateManager allows system administrator to obtain sensitive information. This issue affects: GateManager all versions prior to 9.7.

item.title: CVE-2022-25787 · 7.5 HIGH — GTA URLs issued by LMM WEB API may leak information
item.description: Information Exposure Through Query Strings in GET Request vulnerability in LMM API of Secomea GateManager allows system administrator to hijack connection. This issue affects: Secomea GateManager all versions prior to 9.7.

item.title: CVE-2022-25785 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Buffer overrun
item.description: Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in SiteManager allows logged-in or local user to cause arbitrary code execution. This issue affects: Secomea SiteManager all versions prior to 9.7.

item.title: CVE-2022-25784 · 9.1 CRITICAL — User controllable HTML element attribute (potential XSS)
item.description: Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Web GUI of SiteManager allows logged-in user to inject scripting. This issue affects: Secomea SiteManager all versions prior to 9.7.

item.title: CVE-2022-25783 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Hacking attempts from logged-in users are not properly logged by GM
item.description: Insufficient Logging vulnerability in web server of Secomea GateManager allows logged in user to issue improper queries without logging. This issue affects: Secomea GateManager versions prior to 9.7.

item.title: CVE-2022-25782 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Insufficient privilege checks on object access and updates.
item.description: Improper Handling of Insufficient Privileges vulnerability in Web UI of Secomea GateManager allows logged in user to access and update privileged information. This issue affects: Secomea GateManager versions prior to 9.7.

item.title: CVE-2022-25781 · 4.2 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected XSS issues in GateManager
item.description: Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Web UI of Secomea GateManager allows phishing attacker to inject javascript or html into logged in user session.

item.title: CVE-2022-25780 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Information leak via device availability query function
item.description: Information Exposure vulnerability in web UI of Secomea GateManager allows logged in user to query devices outside own scope.

item.title: CVE-2022-25779 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Insufficient scope checks allows adding unrelated audit log entries
item.description: Logging of Excessive Data vulnerability in audit log of Secomea GateManager allows logged in user to write text entries in audit log. This issue affects: Secomea GateManager versions prior to 9.7.

item.title: CVE-2022-25778 · 4.2 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Unload handlers may unintentionally defeat CSRF guards
item.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Web UI of Secomea GateManager allows phishing attacker to issue get request in logged in user session.

item.title: CVE-2021-32010 · 5.6 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Clients may connect to a GateManager with TLS 1.0
item.description: Inadequate Encryption Strength vulnerability in TLS stack of Secomea SiteManager, LinkManager, GateManager may facilitate man in the middle attacks. This issue affects: Secomea SiteManager All versions prior to 9.7. Secomea LinkManager versions prior…

item.title: CVE-2021-32009 · 5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Missing XSS guards on firmware page
item.description: Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in firmware section of Secomea GateManager allows logged in user to inject javascript in browser session. This issue affects: Secomea GateManager Version 9.6.621421014 and all prior versions.

item.title: CVE-2021-32005 · 6.5 MEDIUM — SiteManager Log View XSS Issue
item.description: Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in log view of Secomea SiteManager allows a logged in user to store javascript for later execution. This issue affects: Secomea SiteManager Version 9.6.621421014 and all prior versions.

item.title: CVE-2021-32006 · 5 MEDIUM — GateManager information leak for LinkManager Users
item.description: This issue affects: Secomea GateManager Version 9.6.621421014 and all prior versions. Permission Issues vulnerability in LinkManager web portal of Secomea GateManager allows logged in LinkManager user to access stored SiteManager backup files.

item.title: CVE-2021-32008 · 9.9 CRITICAL — Logged-in Administrator may get unrestricted file system access
item.description: This issue affects: Secomea GateManager Version 9.6.621421014 and all prior versions. Improper Limitation of a Pathname to restricted directory, allows logged in GateManager admin to delete system Files or Directories.

item.title: CVE-2021-32004 · 3.7 LOW 🌩️ — GateManager does not enforce strict hostname matching for WEB server
item.description: This issue affects: Secomea GateManager All versions prior to 9.6. Improper Check of host header in web server of Secomea GateManager allows attacker to cause browser cache poisoning.

item.title: CVE-2021-32003 · 8 HIGH — Configuration service port remains open 10 minutes after reboot even when already provisioned
item.description: Unprotected Transport of Credentials vulnerability in SiteManager provisioning service allows local attacker to capture credentials if the service is used after provisioning. This issue affects: Secomea SiteManager All versions prior to 9.5 on Hardwa…

item.title: CVE-2021-32002 · 4.3 MEDIUM — SiteManager troubleshooter allows access without authentication from local network
item.description: Improper Access Control vulnerability in web service of Secomea SiteManager allows local attacker without credentials to gather network information and configuration of the SiteManager. This issue affects: Secomea SiteManager All versions prior to 9.…

item.title: CVE-2020-29030 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Insufficient CSRF guards
item.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in web GUI of Secomea GateManager allows an attacker to execute malicious code. This issue affects: Secomea GateManager All versions prior to 9.4.

item.title: CVE-2020-29020 · 9.1 CRITICAL — Reject Remote Management via Cellular UPLINK2
item.description: Improper Access Control vulnerability in web service of Secomea SiteManager allows remote attacker to access the web UI from the internet using the configured credentials. This issue affects: Secomea SiteManager All versions prior to 9.4.620527004 on…

item.title: CVE-2020-29028 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected XSS issues
item.description: Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in web GUI of Secomea GateManager allows an attacker to inject arbitrary javascript code. This issue affects: Secomea GateManager all versions prior to 9.4.

item.title: CVE-2020-29029 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — XSS issue due to insufficient sanitization of input field
item.description: Improper Input Validation, Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Web GUI of Secomea GateManager allows an attacker to execute arbitrary javascript code. This issue affects: Secomea GateManager all versions prior to 9.4.

item.title: CVE-2020-29032 · 8.4 HIGH — Add integrity check of GateManager firmware
item.description: Upload of Code Without Integrity Check vulnerability in firmware archive of Secomea GateManager allows authenticated attacker to execute malicious code on server. This issue affects: Secomea GateManager all versions prior to 9.4.621054022

item.title: CVE-2020-29027 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Reflected Cross Site Scripting
item.description: Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in GUI of Secomea SiteManager could allow an attacker to cause an XSS Attack. This issue affects: Secomea SiteManager all versions prior to 9.3.

item.title: CVE-2020-29025 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — DOM-based Javascript injection
item.description: A vulnerability in SiteManager-Embedded (SM-E) Web server which may allow attacker to construct a URL that if visited by another application user, will cause JavaScript code supplied by the attacker to execute within the user's browser in the context…

item.title: CVE-2020-29023 · 3.5 LOW — CSV Formula Injection possible due to improper fields escaping in GateManager
item.description: Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output from CSV Report Generator of Secomea GateManager allows an authenticated administrator to generate a CSV file that may run arbitrary commands on a victim's computer when opened in a spreadsheet program (like Ex…

item.title: CVE-2020-29022 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Host Header Injection allowing web cache poisoning attacks
item.description: Failure to Sanitize host header value on output in the GateManager Web server could allow an attacker to conduct web cache poisoning attacks. This issue affects Secomea GateManager all versions prior to 9.3

item.title: CVE-2020-29024 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Missing HtppOnly and Secure flags
item.description: Sensitive Cookie in HTTPS Session Without 'Secure' Attribute vulnerability in (GTA) GoToAppliance of Secomea GateManager could allow an attacker to gain access to sensitive cookies. This issue affects: Secomea GateManager all versions prior to 9.3.

item.title: CVE-2020-29031 · 7.1 HIGH — Insecure Direct Object Reference in GateManager WebUI can cause privilege escalation
item.description: An Insecure Direct Object Reference vulnerability exists in the web UI of the GateManager which allows an authenticated attacker to reset the password of any user in its domain or any sub-domain, via escalation of privileges. This issue affects all G…

item.title: CVE-2020-29026 · 9 CRITICAL
item.description: A directory traversal vulnerability exists in the file upload function of the GateManager that allows an authenticated attacker with administrative permissions to read and write arbitrary files in the Linux file system. This issue affects: GateManage…

item.title: CVE-2020-29021 · 3.5 LOW — Scripting tag chars < > not filtered in input fields could cause Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
item.description: A vulnerability in web UI input field of GateManager allows authenticated attacker to enter script tags that could cause XSS. This issue affects: GateManager all versions prior to 9.3.
